description: Fleet IDs are required across core tables.
Every claim must map to a policy.
Every vehicle must map to a fleet.
Every exposure record must map to a vehicle.
Expired policies should not be active.
Claims cannot be reported before loss date.
Earned premium should not exceed written premium.
Level 4/5 vehicles should have lidar, camera, and radar enabled.
Manual override rate should be reviewed when above 15 per 1,000 autonomous miles.
Claimed vehicles should have exposure records.
